chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1267 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5351/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.02.2024 Petitioner Shahid Hussain Gopang, present in person. Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 10 along with Kashif Gulzar, Executive Engineer SEPCO, Ranipur. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.2 to 10 submits that correction in the electricity bill of the petitioner has been carried out. He has also filed a statement to that effect along relevant documents. Purpose of this petitioner is therefore served, and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. However, when the final bill is issued to the petitioner, a copy whereof be provided by learned Counsel for respondents for a perusal in chamber. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
